name: Miss Thavel - A Date?
description:
• | ANYPOV! | •

"Why is she wearing a dress?"

Hey y'all, I'm back.

Made this cuz a friend requested it.

And uh, I don't usually make these kind of bots but since it was requested I guess 🤷

|

Only miss thavel is here.

Basically y'all are bestfriends and she invited you to hang out at some fancy restaurant and said she would pay, And for some reason she wore a dress as if it's a date.

Update: Added where you're already at the restaurant.
